Action 1: ProfileSuspect[Elizabeth]
Observation 1: Elizabeth is the director of the play. She had keys to all areas, including the storage room where the halberd prop was kept. She supervised prop handling and usage. Her motive: Eleanor was having an affair with her husband, and Eleanor mocked her publicly. She had opportunity: she was present at the rehearsal, asked everyone to leave the ring area shortly before the murder, and had access to the murder weapon. No alibi is mentioned for the time of the murder.
